title: pisum sativum var. pumilio
intro: Pisum sativum var. pumilio, also known as the dwarf garden pea or pea shoot, is a variety of the common pea plant that is harvested for its young shoots and leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Pisum sativum var. pumilio include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, improve digestion, and support bone health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the young shoots and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by incorporating them into salads and smoothies.
